DEFENDANT ANGEL FOOD LLC DBA NOPA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LAWRENCE JOSSEL, CHEF AND HOLLY RHODES, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. BAILIFF: DEPUTY WILSON. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
